review_title: A great SEO tool that tracks SERPs
description: Nozzle is an amazing features rich, rank tracking tool and best part about Nozzle is its ability to analyze all these metrics on one page at once. This makes it easier than ever before to keep tabs on what's going on with your site.
author: Faheem R.
pros: Nozzle is an amazing rank tracking tool with 100+ features. The data analyzed from the top 100 pages of your search query gives a deep view of what is being done by your top competitors. It also provides you with detailed information about how they are ranking on Google, Bing and other major engines like Yahoo! The rank tracking helps you in understanding which keywords to target for better rankings. You can even get insights into why certain keyword phrases have higher or lower competition than others. This will help you understand if it’s worth targeting these terms at all.
cons: There is a room for improvements. There is a serious need for local rank tracking, people also asked, and feature snippets. But overall Nozzle has been one of my favorite tools so far. I highly recommend this product. They have put up a good roadmap of the features that I thought this software lacks. It allows users to create their own dashboard based on their needs. They can easily set up goals, track conversions, measure traffic sources, analyze user behavior patterns and much more.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Nozzle allows me to schedule when to run the analysis - anywhere between hourly to monthly. I really like the flexibility since it allows me to set it to higher frequencies for traffic heavy sites, and weekly for sites that aren't yet getting much traction. This allows me to save my pulls for the important stuff! I love that I get a bird's eye view of useful insights and analytics and that I can I can easily monitor not just my sites but my competitors, which helps me figure out what I need to do to climb up those ranks in a shorter amount of time!
author: Carol C.
pros: This tool provides a very comprehensive way to track the performance of your sites and articles! In addition to detailed SERP tracking that lets to you see what's changed with snapshots, you can competitor analysis with tracking for them included at no extra additional credit/pull usage. In addition, you can track for single URLs as well instead of the top level domain, which allows you to keep an eye out on your social media pages, Amazon storefronts, and more! But probably the most impresive thing about Nozzle is that they do more than simple rank and SERP tracking, they have plenty of data for you to feast your eyes upon including understanding how far down on the screen your site shows up measured in pixels! Which is quite interesting! We can also get access to all the Google PAA associated with our keywords and see stats for those as well, which allows us to see ways to improve our ranks. This is a very cool feature on its own, and I'm very pleased it's included.
cons: What I don't completely love about Nozzle is how overwhelming their data looks. Because they offer such a comprehensive analysis, it's easy to feel intimidated by all the charts, graphs, and tables we're presented with when we first log in to the software. There is definitely a learning curve and I feel the learning curve can be better addressed with better onboarding guided tours.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: It's more than a rank tracker
author: Usama N.
pros: After only a few days of using my nozzle, I'm discovering a lot that I had not previously seen for my business sites. Among the features of Nozzle that I believe are unique are: > You can track all domains and check their ranking by searching for them (it eliminates the need to add your competitors' domains during the setup process). >Keep track of real ranking positions, not just site listings, since today's SERP has many features such as featured snippets, too many ads, google maps, user-examined questions, and more. It shows you the actual ranking of your domain name in search results. It tracks all digital properties in the search engine results, such as social media channels, maps, and feature snippets. > Using it, you can see all websites competing for your keywords. A huge list of competitors are competing with me for my 300 or more keyword phrases. For my keywords, I see 9000 domains competing. Interesting and scary insight :)
cons: I dislike the following aspects of this software and its developers: > Bugs. > Difficult to use UI. > Slow support team.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Nozzle.io helps me monitor my SEO performance and keep an eye on competition as well
description: Company owner Derek Perkins is a self-proclaimed big data nerd, and this is reflected in the product he created. The SERP data can be sliced and diced in many ways, and the tool has a lot of ambitions plans ahead (look up their roadmap for more info). Derek is also ridiculously accessible in support chat, and is genuinely helpful.
author: Ivan A.
pros: Nozzle.io is unique among rank tracking software in that it captures a vast amount of data (up to 100 SERP results) and stores it forever. This means that I can follow my competitors’ performance even before I know they are my competitors; as soon as I insert a competitor brand, Nozzle.io can analyze its performance all the way back to the moment it appeared in the top 100 results for that keyword.
cons: Setting up Nozzle.io is hard; at least it was for me. But I do not necessarily think this is bad. Perhaps the correct word is not “hard” but “demanding”, as the tools requires of me to make many decisions and plan ahead: how to structure the projects and keyword groups; how often to request them to be pulled; on what devices (desktops, tablets, phones, the latter two further differentiated as iOS- or Android-based); for what geographic locations (down to city level). Each combination of all factors makes a separate keyword pull, and I must think carefully so as not to spend my monthly keyword pull budget carelessly and go into over usage just to obtain too much data. Nozzle.io can also appear to be expensive if one is doing just a precursory comparison against other tools. But this will be the wrong way to do this, and I implore all potential buyers to look past the simple metric of “keyword pulls per month, per plan”. The truth of the matter is that keyword pulls can be used sparingly, and the data can be re-used indefinitely. No other keyword ranking tool does anything even remotely similar. When the user becomes more familiar with the way the tool works, he or she will realize that the monthly quota can go a really long way.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Best all-round tracker for my ecom businesses
description: There are other tools that offer to track keywords, but most of them are limited to KW tracking on your website and your competitors' website. On other channels, we would have to manually track, with no consistent way of doing so.
author: Duy N.
pros: It gives us an all-round view of everything that's going on around our brands, as well as our competitors. You enter the keywords you'd like it to track, and also the competitors across different channels such as website, Facebook, Instagram, Youtube. I have not seen any other tools that offer this.
cons: The UI can definitely use a makeover to be more intuitive and easier to find the data
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: If you aren't using nozzle, you're at a big disadvantage
author: Osazeme U.
pros: The sheer quality and volume of data, and the competitive edge you get from spying from competitors. It's absolutely phenomenal. The team, too, is agile in implementing cutting edge features. Its freaking cheap for the performance of this tool.
cons: I currently didn't see what not to like. The tool didn't give access to google console but that feature is currently being implemented. I can't pick a flaw.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

review_title: Centralization of Power at One Dashboard
description: I am tracking my website and social media handles from one place. Get to understand which key words are being searched and people are looking for. And Accordingly I can create my new piece of content. I even had no idea when started using it. But The tool is really helpful with a great support system.
author: Amit W.
pros: Tracking of All Social Media Handles and website from one space. So It's easy to understand now which of your video and keywords performing. And What should be your next content. This is a great help from Nozzle.
cons: At times seems abstruse but Actually it's easy. The best part is support team ready to help at any point of time. So For me They are always good. Helps and guide you completely.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: The most exhaustive and complete way to know your real visibility on Google
description: Nozzle is a valuable tool for tracking and analyzing Google traffic and SERP on your website. It eliminates the mystery of SEO and provides us with detailed analysis of our visibility and the traffic it provides us with accurate tracking of your competitors.
author: François H.
pros: Nozzle helps you know exactly where your website is ranking in the search engines. Not just your website, but also your YouTube channel and other social media channels. Analyzing your position in search engines is truly fascinating. You can compare your results in the SERP with previous dates and against an unlimited number of competitors. I like to use Nozzle because I can dive as deep into the data as I want with the rich set of aggregates they provide.
cons: It still lacks reporting and alerting, keyword research and backlink tracking features. Getting started can be a bit complicated because the tool is very powerful and geared towards the use of SEO experts, but it suits me perfectly.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Coën V.
pros: - lots of data and insights - very high segmentation and drill downs - up to date data
cons: - may not be suitable for newbies - learning curve, but well written docs are there - the UI may not be eye friendly but the data here is way more important
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Jonathan N.
pros: I love how much data Nozzle provides. While traditional rank tracking tools give you the basic "ranking position", Nozzle goes a step further by offering metrics I've never seen before, e.g. above the fold %. Metrics like that provide unique insights into organic performance, i.e. what use is ranking #3 if your site is below the fold --> this means you should focus your optimization efforts on that keyword, if possible.
cons: I feel like the UI could be a bit more user-friendly. Because Nozzle provides you with so much data, the dashboards can quickly get overwhelming. The first time I logged in, I was definitely at a loss at what to do. It gets better over time as you get used to the platform but recognize that there's going to be a learning curve.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: 5/5, or 10/10, however you want to put it. You can just sense the quality of this tool when you login to your portal the first time.
author: Atte S.
pros: The title tells it all: Absurd amount of SERP data... on both you and your competitors. Now with one data pull you will get the top 100 SERP results, and with the cheapest plan you already have 10k data pulls. So this is an absolute MUST tool for anyone looking to jump into search engine optimization and conduct it seriously.
cons: It has so many functions that it can be challenging to use it to its full extent, but I consider this to be more of a positive thing than a con.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Very impressed with the tool, accurate data, proper pricing strategy by using pulls instead of keywords. Does not bar features no matter which plan you are on, which is very late lately on SEO tools

You can add bunch of keywords and the results are 100% accurate. I am very happy with this rank checking tool and I highly recommend it to anyone who needs a rank checker.

Really a lot of possibilities. Also the What I also appreciate a lot is that future features are announced in the administration, and that the roadmap preannounces great things to come and finally that the team works hard to improve and enrich the service. description: Experience has been very positive. The onboarding was very quick and straightforward, and the amount of data available was mind-blowing!

I was pleasantly surprised by the following features, which I love! 1) Daily SERP tracking but with a visual record of the SERPs 2) keyword CTR estimates calculated for you 3) In-depth Keyword analysis 4) Unlimited Competitor analysis 5) Keyword gap - this one is brilliant!
cons: The dashboard is not very intuitive, and there is a learning curve for a SERP analysis tool.
